questionHtml: Deduce with a reason the identity of the father.
markschemeHtml:
1. male 2;
  2. each band in the child’s DNA must be the same as a band in either the mother or the father
    OR
    any band in the child’s profile that is not present in the mother’s profile must be present in the father’s;

Must mention both the mother and father

meta.title: Deduce with a reason the identity of the father.
breadcrumbLabels: C1.3.7. Techniques for varying concentrations of carbon dioxide, light intensity or temperature experimentally to investigate the effects of limiting factors on the rate of photosynthesis
